onboard: 2010: Insert cut transponder (B116-PT, ID46 GM EXT) into ignition, turn ON. THEFT light illuminates — hold ON for 10 min until light goes out. Within 55 s, turn OFF then back ON for second 10-min cycle. Repeat third time (30 min total). Key is programmed when THEFT light extinguishes on third cycle. 2011–2015 add-key (1 working key): insert working key, turn ON until THEFT light extinguishes (~10–20 s), turn OFF and remove. Insert new key within 10 s, turn ON — THEFT light extinguishes when programmed. 2016–2017 add-key requires 2 working keys: turn key 1 ON then OFF, within 5 s turn key 2 ON then OFF, within 5 s turn new key ON — programmed when THEFT light extinguishes.
addKey: 1 working key (2010–2015): insert working key ON until theft light off, remove, insert new key within 10 s, turn ON — light off = done. 2 working keys required (2016–2017): cycle key 1 ON/OFF, within 5 s cycle key 2 ON/OFF, within 5 s turn new key ON.
allKeysLost: AKL onboard procedure (10 min × 3 cycles, 30 min total): insert uncut but chip-matched key, turn ON, THEFT light on — hold 10 min until off; within 55 s OFF then ON for 10 min; repeat third time. Alternatively use OBD programmer (Autel IM608, OBDSTAR X300 PRO3, Xhorse VVDI2) via OBD port — no PIN required for ID46 GM EXT systems.
obdPort: Under dash driver side, left of steering column, port faces downward
securityWait: 10 min × 3 cycles (30 min) for AKL onboard; ~10–20 s for add-key
specialTool: None for onboard procedure; Autel IM608 / OBDSTAR X300 PRO3 / Xhorse VVDI2 for OBD-based AKL

addKey: DIY onboard add-key via driver door lock cylinder and cup holder (2018–2020): extract emergency blade, insert into driver door lock cylinder, turn counterclockwise 5 times within 10 s; DIC displays 'Remote Learn Pending.' Place new fob in cupholder/transmitter pocket, press START/STOP once; DIC confirms when learned. Press LOCK/UNLOCK on fob to finalize. Hold START/STOP 5–15 s to exit. Requires at least 2 existing recognized fobs present to initiate sequence. 2021+: OBD scan tool required (no onboard add-key).
allKeysLost: AKL: OBD programmer required (Autel IM508/IM608, OBDSTAR X300 PRO3, Xhorse VVDI2). 2018–2020: scan tool communicates with BCM/PEPS module; open/close driver door every 3–4 s during 12-min programming window; minimum 2 keys must be learned. 2021–2024: requires CAN FD adapter + scan tool; 24-digit security verification code from Autel/third-party server required for AKL on 2021+ CANFD system.
obdPort: Under dash driver side, left of steering column, port faces downward
securityWait: ~12 min AKL door-cycling window (scan tool guided)
specialTool: Autel IM508/IM608 + CAN FD adapter (2021+); Autel IM508/IM608 or OBDSTAR X300 PRO3 (2018–2020)

onboard: Transponder variant (2013–2019, B116-PT ID46 GM EXT): 1 working key add-key — insert working key, turn ON until THEFT light off, remove; insert new key within 10 s, turn ON until THEFT light off = programmed. AKL: 10 min × 3 cycles onboard. Smart key variant (2020–2022): see cup-holder procedure below.
addKey: Transponder: 1 working key — working key ON/off, new key ON within 10 s. Smart key: cup-holder/door-cylinder method (2 existing fobs required): turn emergency blade in driver door lock counterclockwise 5 × within 10 s; place new fob in transmitter pocket; press START/STOP.
allKeysLost: Transponder AKL: 10 min × 3 cycles onboard (30 min) or OBD programmer. Smart key AKL: OBD scan tool (Autel IM508/IM608, OBDSTAR, Xhorse VVDI2); open/close driver door every 3–4 s during 12-min window; no PIN required.
obdPort: Under dash driver side, left of steering column
securityWait: 10 min × 3 cycles for transponder AKL; ~12 min door-cycling for smart key AKL
specialTool: None for transponder onboard; Autel IM508/IM608 or OBDSTAR for smart key AKL

addKey: OBD scan tool required. No DIY onboard procedure. Cup-holder method NOT supported on 2024 Trax (new platform). Use Autel IM508/IM608 or OBDSTAR X300 PRO3.
allKeysLost: AKL: OBD scan tool (Autel IM508/IM608, OBDSTAR X300 PRO3, Xhorse VVDI2); CAN FD adapter may be required. Open/close driver door every 3–4 s during scan-tool-guided 12-min window. 24-digit security verification code may be required (2024 CANFD new system).
obdPort: Under dash driver side, left of steering column
securityWait: ~12 min door-cycling (scan tool guided)
specialTool: Autel IM508/IM608 + CAN FD adapter
